port_metadata.provider: Compañía Marítima del Pacífico, S.A. de C.V.
port_metadata.tax_note: Rates do not include Value Added Tax (VAT)

calculation_definitions.basic_quota: The specific dollar amount found in the 'tariff_matrix_per_vessel' that matches the vessel's Gross Register Tonnage (TRB).
calculation_definitions.relevant_quota: Identical to the 'basic_quota'; this term is used interchangeably in the rules as the base for penalty and waiting time calculations.
calculation_definitions.movement_time_definition: Legally defined as 20 minutes before the time indicated in the service request
calculation_definitions.time_measurement_start: Starts when lines are exchanged or when the tug is ready at the agreed location
calculation_definitions.time_measurement_end: Ends when lines are cast off or as indicated by the pilot

rate_table.definition: This value serves as the 'basic_quota' and 'relevant_quota' for vessels in this bracket
This value serves as the 'basic_quota' and 'relevant_quota' for vessels in this bracket
This value serves as the 'basic_quota' and 'relevant_quota' for vessels in this bracket

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Small Vessel Discount
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: Apply multiplier to the total amount of the maneuvers

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Bow Thruster Discount
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.vessel_equipment_specific: Vessels with an operational Bow Thruster using only one tug
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: Apply multiplier to the matching 'basic_quota' from the matrix

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Additional Time / Overtime
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: Apply multiplier to the matching 'basic_quota' from the matrix

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Late Cancellation
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Notice given < 1 hour before tug movement (Requested Time - 20 mins)
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: Apply multiplier to the matching 'relevant_quota' from the matrix

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Cancellation After Movement
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: User desists from service once tugs have started moving
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: Apply multiplier to the matching 'relevant_quota' from the matrix

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Waiting / Standby Time
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Tugs must wait after the time indicated in request
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.basis: Per hour or fraction of wait time
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.calculation_logic: Apply multiplier to the matching 'relevant_quota' from the matrix

vessel_specific_exclusions.note: 2025 tariff updates do not apply; billed under previous authorized rates
Subject to negotiation based on international maritime customs

administrative_rules.notice_period: Service must be requested in writing 3 hours in advance during business hours
administrative_rules.payment_requirement: Users must cover the estimated amount at the time of request; final adjustment made upon invoice
administrative_rules.rounding_logic: Duration is rounded up to the nearest 15-minute increment for overtime billing
